playlists.title: Midnight Synthwave
playlists.description: A collection of retro-futuristic synthwave tracks perfect for late-night coding sessions. Pulsing basslines meet ethereal pads in this neon-lit sonic journey.

tracks.title: Savage Crunch - Black and White - Sonauto
tracks.creationDescription: Built from a vintage Juno-106 patch layered with modern Serum wavetables. The arpeggio sequence was inspired by classic Tangerine Dream compositions.

tracks.title: Echo Chains - Cage in My Head - Sonauto
tracks.audioFile: /audio/Echo Chains - Cage in My Head - Sonauto.mp3
tracks.creationDescription: Started with a TR-808 drum pattern and built layers of analog-modeled synths on top. The sidechained pad gives it that breathing, pulsing feel.

tracks.title: Midnight Glow - Cold Shadows - Sonauto
tracks.creationDescription: A long-form ambient synthwave piece created through granular synthesis of vintage VHS tape recordings, processed through analog delay and reverb chains.

tracks.title: Purple Rainfall - Nightfall Omen - Sonautos
tracks.creationDescription: Composed entirely using a modular synthesizer, patch cables creating complex rhythmic patterns that evolve over the course of the track.

tracks.title: event-horizon
tracks.creationDescription: Blends vaporwave aesthetics with driving synthwave rhythms. Sampled and time-stretched jazz recordings form the harmonic foundation.

tracks.title: Digital Sunset
tracks.creationDescription: Warm analog pads layered with crisp digital arpeggios create a nostalgic sunset vibe. Built around a Prophet-5 patch with modern production techniques.

tracks.title: Midnight Drive
tracks.creationDescription: Inspired by late-night highway drives, featuring a pulsing Moog bassline and atmospheric reverb-drenched leads that evoke the feeling of neon-lit roads.

tracks.title: Laser Grid
tracks.creationDescription: Fast-paced retro synthwave with aggressive saw leads and punchy 808 drums. The laser effects were created using frequency modulation synthesis.

tracks.title: Hologram Rain
tracks.creationDescription: A moody piece combining rainfall field recordings with glitchy synth textures. The melody was generated using a step sequencer with random probability gates.

tracks.title: Turbo Flux
tracks.creationDescription: High-energy synthwave with racing arpeggios and deep sub-bass. Inspired by 80s arcade game soundtracks, reinterpreted with modern sound design.

tracks.title: Phantom Signal
tracks.creationDescription: Mysterious and atmospheric, built from processed radio static and modular synthesizer patches. Features an evolving pad that shifts through spectral harmonics.

tracks.title: Prism Shift
tracks.creationDescription: A colorful, upbeat track using layered detuned oscillators to create a shimmering, prismatic quality. The drums blend TR-707 samples with modern electronic percussion.

tracks.title: Starfield Echo
tracks.creationDescription: Expansive and cinematic, featuring delay-heavy lead synths over a bed of evolving ambient textures. Recorded through vintage tape echo units for authentic warmth.

tracks.title: Circuit Breaker
tracks.creationDescription: A glitchy, experimental synthwave track featuring circuit-bent toy keyboards processed through distortion and granular effects. Chaotic yet rhythmically precise.

tracks.title: Neon Cathedral
tracks.creationDescription: A grand, reverberant piece inspired by cathedral acoustics translated into electronic form. Massive pad stacks and choir-like synths create an ethereal, sacred atmosphere.

playlists.title: Lo-Fi Study Beats
playlists.description: Chill lo-fi hip hop instrumentals designed for focus and relaxation. Warm vinyl crackle, mellow keys, and head-nodding rhythms.

tracks.title: Rainy Window
tracks.creationDescription: Recorded rain sounds from a window mic, layered with a Rhodes piano loop played through a cassette tape for that warm, saturated tone.

tracks.title: Late Night Coffee
tracks.creationDescription: Built around a guitar sample processed through vinyl emulation plugins. The drums were created by resampling classic boom-bap breaks at half speed.

tracks.title: Paper Cranes
tracks.creationDescription: Inspired by Japanese city pop, this track features a pitch-shifted vocal chop over dusty SP-404 style drums and a warm sub bass.

tracks.title: Bookshelf Memories
tracks.creationDescription: A melancholic piano melody recorded on an old upright piano, processed with tape saturation and paired with chopped vocal textures.

playlists.title: Deep Space Ambient
playlists.description: Immersive ambient soundscapes inspired by the vast emptiness and beauty of outer space. Perfect for meditation, deep work, or drifting off to sleep.

tracks.title: Event Horizon
tracks.creationDescription: Created by processing NASA radio telescope recordings through granular synthesis and layering with slowly evolving pad sounds from Omnisphere.

tracks.title: Nebula Drift
tracks.creationDescription: Uses binaural frequency techniques at 432Hz tuning. Multiple layers of reversed and stretched string recordings create the drifting sensation.

tracks.title: Solar Wind
tracks.creationDescription: Sonified actual solar wind data into audio frequencies, then harmonized with synthesizer drones to create an otherworldly listening experience.

tracks.title: Frozen Orbit
tracks.creationDescription: Built entirely from processed field recordings of ice cracking and wind, pitch-shifted and time-stretched into ethereal ambient textures.

tracks.title: Quantum Lullaby
tracks.creationDescription: A generative composition using algorithmic probability to determine note timing and velocity, creating a piece that feels both structured and organic.

playlists.title: Cinematic Electronica
playlists.description: Epic electronic compositions with cinematic scope. Soaring melodies, massive builds, and emotional drops that tell a story without words.

tracks.title: Titan Rising
tracks.creationDescription: Combines orchestral sample libraries (Spitfire Audio) with aggressive electronic bass design. The build uses 64 layered synth voices for maximum impact.

tracks.title: Light Cascade
tracks.creationDescription: Started as a simple piano improvisation, then rebuilt with electronic production. Each piano note triggers a cascade of synthesized harmonics.

tracks.title: Stormbreaker
tracks.creationDescription: Features field-recorded thunderstorms as percussion elements, integrated with heavy dubstep-influenced bass and cinematic string arrangements.

tracks.title: Aurora
tracks.creationDescription: Inspired by the Northern Lights, this track uses spectral processing to create shimmering, color-like audio textures over a driving four-on-the-floor beat.

playlists.title: Acoustic Sessions
playlists.description: Intimate acoustic recordings featuring guitar, piano, and strings. Raw and authentic performances captured in warm studio settings.

tracks.title: Morning Light
tracks.creationDescription: Recorded with a single condenser microphone in a wooden cabin. The natural room reverb adds warmth to the fingerpicked acoustic guitar performance.

tracks.title: Willow Creek
tracks.creationDescription: Features a nylon string classical guitar played alongside a softly bowed cello. Both parts were performed live in a single take.

tracks.title: Old Photographs
tracks.creationDescription: A nostalgic piano piece recorded on a restored 1920s Steinway grand piano. The subtle mechanical sounds of the keys add character and authenticity.

tracks.title: Sunlit Meadow
tracks.creationDescription: A pure acoustic tone captured in WAV format for maximum fidelity. The uncompressed recording preserves every nuance of the original performance.

tracks.title: Evening Breeze
tracks.creationDescription: Recorded and encoded in OGG Opus format, this track demonstrates the warmth and clarity of open-source audio codecs for intimate acoustic recordings.
